creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
When fetching from the original distfile site (not the FreeBSD cache), fetching these distfiles now fails with a 403:

===> Fetching all distfiles required by intel-em-kmod-7.7.5 for building
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for em-7.7.5.tar.gz.
=> No SHA256 checksum recorded for ixl_pf_main.c?view=patch&r1=358698&r2=358697&pathrev=358698.
=> No suitable checksum found for ixl_pf_main.c?view=patch&r1=358698&r2=358697&pathrev=358698.
*** Error code 1

===> Fetching all distfiles required by intel-ix-kmod-3.3.14_1 for building
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for ix-3.3.14.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for ix-3.3.10.tar.gz.
=> No SHA256 checksum recorded for ixl_pf_main.c?view=patch&r1=358698&r2=358697&pathrev=358698.

*** Error code 1
